age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable up to 5 years for OBC candidates (Non-Creamy Layer).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR Senior Resident (Pathology) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR Senior Resident (Pathology) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR Senior Resident (Pathology) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICMR Senior Resident (Pathology) post is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident (Pathology) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed MD (Pathology), DNB (Pathology), or DCP within the last 3 years to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ICMR Senior Resident (Pathology) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this recruitment is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Resident (Pathology) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident (Pathology) position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Senior Resident (Pathology) post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a salary as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix Level-11.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released by ICMR?
faq.answer: ICMR has released a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Resident (Pathology) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this recruitment by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this ICMR recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Resident (Pathology) position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
